title: Up Tails All.
content:
Begin with a kiss,
        Go on too with this;
    And thus, thus, thus let us smother
        Our lips for awhile,
        But let's not beguile
    Our hope of one for the other.

        This play, be assur'd,
        Long enough has endur'd,
    Since more and more is exacted;
        For Love he doth call
        For his uptails all;
    And that's the part to be acted.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Up Tails All."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
